task_description: Major UI overhaul: fix country dropdown (all countries), fix type badge visibility (black text), fix career path spacing (5px gaps, centered last card), add contact form for register/enroll, remove for-employers/for-students pages, update navbar (Home/Opportunities/Post/Mail), add filters (salary/hours/rating), create new pages (/get-started, /opportunities, /mail), move profile creation to /get-started, add more opportunities, and set up Supabase integration.
